rejected.reason: SessionDB reading path (state.db messages table, added in #399/#623) already captures successful sessions alongside error-triggered dumps. introspection_extract.py reads from SessionDB which stores >90% of sessions regardless of success/failure.
Investigation meta-issue that duplicates the existing evolution introspection pipeline, which already tracks refusals as a signal and generates concrete implementation issues.
Investigation meta-issue. The evolution introspection pipeline already surfaces tool_failure signals per tool and generates concrete implementation issues from them.

Most general of the 'investigate' cluster — 'widespread failures in core operational tools' without a concrete implementation proposal. Introspection pipeline already extracts tool_failure signals by tool name.
